content: جَوازُ اَلْمَصْرِيِّينَ وَ اَلْأَجَانِبِ يَبْقَى رَسْمِيًّا عَنْ طَرِيقِ اَلْمَحْكَمَةِ

transcriptions.arabizi: gawaez ilmasriyeen wail'agaenib biyb'a rasmi Aan taree' ilmahkama

credits: Data from [lisaanmasry](https://eu.lisaanmasry.org/info/en/copyright.html); This material is Copyright © 2007-2020 Mike Green.
relationships: eng:marriage of Egyptians and foreigners becomes official (only) through the court
